theory WarnAndLemma

begin

// Function signature and definition of the equational theory E

functions: fst/1, pair/2, snd/1
equations: fst(<x.1, x.2>) = x.1, snd(<x.1, x.2>) = x.2

rule (modulo E) Bad:
   [ ] --[ Ev( ) ]-> [ Out( ~'foo' ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

lemma trivial_true:
  all-traces "∀ #i. (Ev( ) @ #i) ⇒ (∃ #j. Ev( ) @ #j)"
/*
guarded formula characterizing all counter-examples:
"∃ #i. (Ev( ) @ #i) ∧ ∀ #j. (Ev( ) @ #j) ⇒ ⊥"
*/
by sorry

/*
WARNING: the following wellformedness checks failed!

Fresh public constants
======================

  rule `Bad': fresh public constants are not allowed: ~'foo'
*/

/*
Generated from:
Tamarin version 1.13.0
Maude version 3.5.1
Git revision: 0234f6a1abee25677c0accef62de0ac2883b0347 (with uncommited changes), branch: HEAD
Compiled at: 2026-07-16 18:33:16.036427196 UTC
*/

end

  processing time: 0.06s

  trivial_true (all-traces): analysis incomplete (1 steps)
